nasb.text: So they ran and took him from there, and when he stood among the people, he was taller than any of the people from his shoulders upward.

esv.text: Then they ran and took him from there. And when he stood among the people, he was taller than any of the people from his shoulders upward.

cnv.text: 他們就跑過去，把他從那裡領出來；他站在眾人中間，比眾人都高出一個頭。

ccb.text: 他们就跑去把扫罗请来。扫罗站在百姓当中，高出众人一头。
